response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, frameworks), and clear leadership through workshops and open-source initiatives, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven technical leadership via workshops, open-source projects, and cross-team infrastructure work
Broad technical stack spanning mobile (iOS/TV), build systems, and high-performance systems
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience
Limited demonstrated experience with mobile platform ecosystems (iOS/Android) as a focus area
No mention of roadmap planning, organizational change, or cross-team alignment at scale
